title: Vegan Toast Boost
description: A buttery and juicy vegan dish featuring toast topped with raw-friendly vegan butter for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Toast the sourdough slices until golden and slightly crispy.
In a small bowl, mix vegan butter with mixed berries until well combined.
Spread the berry-butter mixture evenly on each slice of toast.
Sprinkle chopped walnuts over each toast.
Place the assembled toasts in the preheated oven for about 5-7 minutes or until the nuts are golden brown and toasted.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
